programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this educational child development film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Frustrating Fours and Fascinating Fives!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where Estonian cyborgs shoot lasers out of their eyes! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Firehead!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 90's action classic! Decapitations, explosions, and mangled dialogue abound in this extremely eighties-nineties movie! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short celebration of plastic storage containers. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Wonderful World of Tupperware!

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: Ninjutsu master Casey is back and out for revenge when his pregnant wife is murdered.

programme.title: Jade Warrior
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago in ancient China, a love struck sword hero fights against his destiny. He wants another chance to be reunited with his loved one and he gets that chance, in a far away place and a far away time, in the cold north, in modern Finland.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings. By forming a fragile alliance with the Viking warriors, the man combines his high-tech weaponry with their Iron Age tools to combat the Moorwen, a vicious alien predator that has followed him to Earth. Based on the novel series by Diana Gabaldon.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Here is the murderously funny movie based on the world-famous Clue board game. Was it Colonel Mustard in the study with a gun, Miss Scarlet in the billiard room with the rope, or was it Wadsworth the butler. Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes.

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: BOOKSMART is a comedy about two academic superstars and best friends on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Audrey and her friend Morgan are going about their humdrum lives when AudreyÕs unassuming ex-boyfriend Drew shows up at their apartment with a team of deadly assassins on his trail. Surprising even themselves, the two friends jump into action when two men are shot dead on their floor, grabbing a top-secret thumb drive and taking off on an undercover mission to save the world.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: After a deadly bank heist, Detectives Quentin Conners (Jason Statham) and Shane Dekker (Ryan Phillippe) are drawn into a mysterious case where nothing is what it seems. Pulling the strings is a criminal mastermind (Wesley Snipes) who seems to kill without warning or reason. Abound with random acts of violence and deception - the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Earth Girls Are Easy
programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and showing them the town.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A groom (Ed Burns) and his four attendants wrestle with issues related to friendship and maturity a week before the big day.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: After getting fired, a man winds up working for his wife's father while she takes care of the baby. Doing a story on her ex- boyfriend, who makes his life miserable, he worries that she will take his side and that he's in for the worst.

programme.title: Friends With Kids
programme.desc: A group of close friends begin to question the nature of family, friendship, and love when one couple experiments with an unconventional lifestyle in this daring romantic comedy.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office.

programme.title: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A Western movie star is forced to spend a PR weekend at a dude ranch.

programme.title: Secrets of an Undercover Wife
programme.desc: Newlywed Wendy Crews has the shock of her life.

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Lynn Bartlett is a successful attorney and contentedly single.

programme.title: Secrets of a Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: Multimillionaire Steven Beard fell hard & married Celeste, an attractive waitress.

programme.title: Secrets of an Undercover Wife
programme.desc: Newlywed Wendy Crews has the shock of her life.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner portrays the leader of a bomb-defusing squad in Iraq. Winner of six Academy Awards.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of conscientious objector Desmond Doss who saved 75 men in WWII without firing a gun.

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: The inspiring true story of the real life 2013 Boston Marathon bombing survivor Jeff Bauman.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Death On the Nile
programme.desc: Hercule Poirot attempts to solve the murder of a wealthy heiress while taking a cruise on the Nile River.

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone
programme.desc: Two Boston area detectives investigate a little girl's kidnapping, which ultimately turns into a crisis

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A Naval officer, reprimanded after Pearl Harbor, is later promoted to Rear Admiral

programme.title: The Razor's Edge
programme.desc: An American WWI vet undertakes a spiritual quest that takes him from the Himalayas and back to his hometown.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: After the fall of Tobruk in June 1942, U.S. Army sergeant Joe Gunn leads his tank into the Sahara desert.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day
programme.desc: A study of the days leading up to the Normandy invasion through the eyes of Eisenhower and Winston Churchill.

programme.title: In The Line Of Fire
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent is taunted by calls from a would-be killer who has detailed information about the agent - including the fact that he failed to save President John F. Kennedy from assassination. When the current president is threatened, the agent is determined not to let history repeat itself.

programme.title: Ship of Fools
programme.desc: Passengers on a ship traveling from Mexico to Europe in the 1930s represent society at large in that era.

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: The first of the series of Secret Agent Matt Helm films, the big cheese of Big O, an organization that wants to sabatoge the American atomic missile system.

programme.title: Under The Yum Yum Tree
programme.desc: A couple in love agree to determine their "character compatability" by living together platonically.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he's fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: G.I. Blues
programme.desc: Elvis adopts an on-screen persona he knows well in real life-a singin' G.I. in West Germany. Eager to open a stateside nightclub after his hitch in khakis, he takes part in a wager to raise the dough he needs.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Loving
programme.desc: An interracial couple fights the law that they cannot be recognized as married in the state of Virginia.

programme.title: The Paleface
programme.desc: A dentist is duped into marrying sharpshooter Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Lorenzo's Oil
programme.desc: The true story of one family's quest to save their son after he's diagnosed with a rare terminal disease.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: In the Scottish town of Inverdoune, the annual soccer match between the scruffy lads of Benny's Bar and the snobs from neighboring L'Bistro is an annual highlight. On the one hundredth anniversary of this sporting challenge, however, the stakes are even higher. The winner claims ownership over his opponent's tavern. This raucously funny ensemble comedy will have you cheering from your seat as Benny's team battles to save their bar and their dignity.

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: 10e
programme.desc: After a 17-year old girl's reputation takes a hit at school before the prom, her single father tries to rebuild their relationship by acting as more of a friend, when what she really needs is a father.

programme.title: Vanilla
programme.desc: A freewheeling comedienne determined to save her family business persuades an uptight app developer to go on a long first date - a road trip to New Orleans to sell a van with a complicated history.

programme.title: Blowing Up Right Now
programme.desc: A millennial couple in a long-term relationship break up amid a nuclear missile crisis in LA.

programme.title: 2nd Date Sex
programme.desc: In hopes of a better relationship this time around, Laura and Ryan are trying to navigate their dating lives. How bad can a second date get? Laura and Ryan are about to find out.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: Uninspired and newly single, painter Sara is down on her luck and wants nothing more than to get away.

programme.title: China Rose
programme.desc: A man arrives in China to search for his son, whom he hasn't seen in many years. A female American Embassy employee, who knows the country and speaks the language, is assigned to assist him, but soon they run into more trouble than they expected.

programme.title: Search and Rescue
programme.desc: An extraordinary search and rescue team soars to new heights in the Sierra Mountains. Pressed into action, this crew is anything but ordinary.

programme.title: The Elizabeth Smart Story
programme.desc: When fourteen-year-old Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her bedroom in her Salt Lake City suburban home, it created an almost unprecedented media frenzy. From its shocking, high-profile beginning to its unexpected closure, Elizabeth's kidnapping touched a nerve nationwide.

programme.title: Stranger in Town, A
programme.desc: Aaron Tomlinson, along with his mother Katherine and little sister Kim move from the big city to Elm Creek. Katherine has just come out of a bad relationship, and decides they all need a change of scenery. The family moves into old Victorian house.

programme.title: Welcome to Dongmakgol
programme.desc: During the Korean War, North and South Korean soldiers confront at a fairy tale-like village Dongmakgol.

programme.title: Familyhood
programme.desc: A self-centered diva Ju-yeon always gets what she wants. One day she realizes that she needs her own baby.

programme.title: Detective K: Secret of Virtuous Widow
programme.desc: A series of murders break out in Joseon. King Jeong-jo commissions a famous detective K to solve the case.

programme.title: FRIEND : THE GREAT LEGACY
programme.desc: Joon-suk takes the blame for a friend's murder years later, the friend's son, unaware, becomes his protégé.

programme.title: More Than Friends
programme.desc: When Angela, a heterosexual, learns her friend, Tennille, loves her, she is surprised to find that she may feel the same.

programme.title: One More Day
programme.desc: "Raquel Ferguson, is an up and coming photographer and single mother to a 15 year old daughter. As her business grows, it causes more strain on the relationship between them. Raquel is driven by the need to be better than her mother, who she has never forgiven for things in the past. Raquel is unable to see the hypocrisy in her own life, as her relationship with her daughter deteriorates right under her nose. When a terrible tragedy occurs, Raquel begs God for a miracle. "

programme.title: Twerk: Reggae Nights
programme.desc: Hard-working, single mother, Iesha, learns that one of the most popular reggae artists, Domino, is holding an audition in her city for dancers in his next music video. The competition is fierce, and some of the ladies will do anything to get the job.

programme.title: ICE
programme.desc: After witnessing his parents murdered as a child, Christian exacts revenge against their killers. He finds himself at a crossroads after developing feelings for the gangleader's daughter.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Imprisoned on a drug charge, mobster Jack DiNorscio (Vin Diesel) refuses to testify against his former associates in the Lucchesi crime family. When an ambitious prosecutor brings him back to court, he decides to defend himself. Initially regarded with disbelief, his forceful presence and knowledge of the law turn the tide of the trial.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: An American Crime
programme.desc: Gertrude Baniszewski, a divorced mother of several children, agrees to take care of two girls, Sylvia and Jennie, while their parents travel with a carnival. Though her eldest daughter is the real troublemaker, Gertrude vents all her bitterness and frustration on innocent Sylvia. Gertrude imprisons the girl in the basement and tortures her, eventually encouraging her children to follow suit.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Double Identity
programme.desc: An American doctor (Val Kilmer) takes a detour in life and becomes a victim of mistaken identity when he helps a mysterious woman (Izabella Miko) escape from her would-be assailant.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: A father (John Cusack) gets entangled in the latest assignment of a dangerous assassin (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: After a massive asteroid crashes into the moon, it's discovered that the moon's structure is now entirely unstable, threatening all life on Earth.

programme.title: Katy Perry
programme.desc: The Prismatic World Tour is a sensory explosion of eye-popping theatrics, daring acrobatics and of course, all the hits. This concert film is a visually stunning production that captures Katy's fun-loving personality and artistic vision. Spanning the entire length of the arena floor, the innovative Prismatic tour stage allows Katy to share intimate moments with her fans in a unique shared connection with the music. Directed for the stage in seven thematic acts, this unmissable spectacle features hit after hit after hit. The World Tour captures the excitement, color and energy of the live Katy Perry extravaganza.

programme.title: Aerosmith
programme.desc: In a career of four turbulent decades of excesses and highs, Aerosmith became the biggest selling American rock band of all time. The ‘Bad Boys' came together in 1970 in Boston, Massachusetts. Aerosmith's third release, ‘Toys in the Attic' made them international stars. Lead single,'Sweet Emotion' became their first top 40 hit. In 1987 Aerosmith released their biggest selling album in over a decade, ‘Permanent Vacation'. The ‘Nine Lives' tour was troubled, but in 1998 Aerosmith's fortunes would change once again. Released as part of the soundtrack to the film, ‘Armageddon', ‘I Don't Want to Miss a Thing' would become the biggest single of their career. In 2012 Aerosmith released the single, ‘Legendary Child'. It had been eight years since they had produced new material but along with the track came the album, ‘Music from another Dimension'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “I DON'T WANNA MISS A THING” “JANIES GOT A GUN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.title: Peligro en la Montaña
programme.desc: Joe Braven es un leñador que vive en la frontera entre los Estados Unidos y Canadá. Cuando es asaltado por narcotraficantes, hará todo lo posible para proteger a su familia.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Rubí empieza a coquetearle a Héctor y consigue trabajar con él en el despacho de su padrino, pero él se siente preocupado, porque Rubí es compañera de Luis, un hijo que tiene con otra persona.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Una vez en la oficina, Rubí no pierde momento para coquetearle a Héctor. Alejandro sospecha que Rubí se trae algo entre manos. Héctor empieza a caer en los juegos de seducción de Rubí y descuida ciertas atenciones con Maribel.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Don Genaro, padrino de Héctor, le miente a su esposa diciéndole que va a un viaje de negocios y realmente va a ver a su otra familia Héctor se siente confundido y comienza a tener pequeñas peleas con Maribel, ella tiene miedo de perderlo.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Los padres de Alejandro se dan cuenta de que el doctor Bermúdez le ha quitado el crédito de la investigación a su hijo. Genaro le pide a Luis regresar a México luego de encontrarse a los papás de Alejandro y ver la cercanía con Sofía.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Relación expuesta
programme.desc: Karla y los demás empleados descubren a Damián en el cuarto de Braulio. Alejandro desconoce a Luciana como su madre. Constancio se rehúsa a decir la verdad a pesar de ver el cuadro de Rosario y Mili.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella está decidida a encontrar a Sergio, aunque tenga que pedir la ayuda de Rodolfo San Genis, él acepta ayudarla a cambio de que se case con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Penélope intenta matar a María, pero ella se defiende y termina siendo castigada por iniciar el pleito. María siente culpa por la muerte de Calixta al pensar que su hijo fue quien la mató e imagina que ve al fantasma de Calixta.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María le dice a Gonzalo que está dispuesta a casarse con él después de salir de la cárcel. Armenteros decide dejar de ser el abogado de Soraya al descubrir todos sus engaños.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a María Mercedes casarse con él. Santiago habla con el licenciado Portales y le exige que case a María Mercedes con él aunque ella no lo acepte.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le cumple a Santiago su última voluntad y se casa con él. Malvina recibe la noticia de que Santiago ha cambiado su testamento y teme haber perdido todo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: La hija del gobernador se burla de Inocencia y su aspecto San Genis le pide a Bella que se case con él, pues ya cumplió con su parte del trato de buscar a Sergio.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Natalia amenaza a Bella con una pistola y jura matarla, pero Brenda logra impedirlo Bella presiona al gobernador para que se casen lo antes posible.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando le dice a Soraya que no la ama, pero ella está decidida a hacer cualquier cosa para estar con él. Penélope le confiesa a María que la odia por tener una mejor posición que ella.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Nadia le confiesa a Víctor que está embarazada y cuando Pedro se entere querrá quedarse con el bebé. Montserrat va a buscar a Angélica a su casa para despedirse de ella.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Víctor le cuenta a Macario que será papá y se irá del pueblo con Nadia, pero le pide guardar el secreto. Angélica fallece en los brazos de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Pedro insinúa que Alejandro no es hijo de Benjamín y pone en duda la palabra de Rosario. Montserrat se da cuenta de que Dimitrio está muy triste y él le cuenta que Josefina le pidió el divorcio y se irá del pueblo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Graciela le ofrece ayuda a José Luis para recuperar a Montserrat a un precio muy alto, pero él no acepta su negocio. El capitán Robledo arresta a José Luis y es enviado a prisión.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le cuenta a Pedro que Nadia está esperando un hijo de Víctor. Refugio le dice a José Luis que su condena será de siete años.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Pedro le informa a Nadia que van a hacer un viaje largo y que después se encargará de desaparecer a Víctor. Alejandro descubre que María está viva.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Alejandro descubre que María ha estado bailando en "La Escondida". Monserrat golpea a Pedro en la cabeza, él se desmaya y Alejandro se echa la culpa para que Monserrat pueda escapar con Nadia.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor: Familia
programme.desc: Max habla con Fernanda y Victoria acerca de María Desamparada. Victoria y Fernanda le piden a Max que lleve a sus hijos a la casa para verlos.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Vanesa y Bruno enfurecen al saber que la hacienda de Rogelio no se pude comprar. Ana Paula decide continuar con el juicio en contra de Vanesa para poder recuperar su herencia. Gustavo enfrenta a Rogelio y le dice que luchará por el amor de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: María decide alejarse de Cynthia para evitar que la continúe humillando. Macaria y Ulises logran divorciarse. Ana Paula comienza a trabajar como enfermera en uno de los mejores hospitales del pueblo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia recibe la mala noticia de que será trasladada al penal. Cynthia seduce a un policía para lograr convencerlo de que la ayude a escapar. Ana Paula decide divorciarse de Rogelio.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Presos del penal llevan a cabo los planes de Bruno para deshacerse de Miguel. Miguel descubre que Rosaura lo traicionó a él y a Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ernesto y Mercedes se alegran al saber que serán padres. Vanesa decide irse del pueblo para comenzar una nueva vida. Ana Paula y Rogelio se casan y frente a los ojos de Dios se juran amor eterno.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana le exige a Toledo que se aleje de ella. Toledo idea un plan para reconquistar a Ivana. Leonor cree que Ivana tiene una relación secreta con Toledo. Valentina decide terminar su relación con José Miguel para evitar que Ivana los descubra.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Sandra y Felipe preparan todo para festejar su boda. Toledo le confiesa a Valentina el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Isabel es acosada por las presas de la cárcel, quienes le exigen una fuerte cantidad de dinero a cambio de seguridad.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: El Chino necesita visitar el Museo de Antropología e Historia para un trabajo de la escuela. María se ofrece a acompañarlo y compromete a Albertano a ir con ellos. Sin embargo, los jóvenes pasan una romántica tarde hasta que se acuerdan lo prometido.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Renata empieza a trabajar como vendedora de cosméticos porque está harta de que en la casa nadie ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby está triste porque Plutarco encontró trabajo como auxiliar de vuelo y se ausenta. Martina se pone a dieta y Alfonso encuentra una cadenita valiosa que trae problemas.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acepta a ir a terapia con mucha gente extraña por su adicción a las mujeres jóvenes. Miranda descubre que Paco les paga a mujeres jóvenes para tener intimidad con ellas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le pregunta a Franco si está seguro de terminar con ella Diego asegura que su papá está en Nueva York y no sabrá que están de gira Miguel no sabe cómo decirle a Mia que Sabrina es la fotógrafa oficial de RBD Sol abandona a Celina en la selva.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se entera que Sabrina estará en el concierto de RBD en Monterrey y se entristece Max llega a Puerto Vallarta y, al ver a Celina, le dice que la quiere. Roberta le dice a Mia que no permita que Sabrina le quite las ganas de cantar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: José y Celina se asustan al ver a Javier y al enterarse que León está en Puerto Vallarta el concierto de RBD fue un éxito, y Mia le agradece a Roberta sus consejos Javier le dice a León que Diego esta con una chica para distraerlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los chicos de RBD sufren porque en el avión en el que viajan tienen unas terribles turbulencias provocadas por una tormenta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los muchachos de RBD llegan a Puerto Vallarta para reunirse con los otros estudiantes del colegio. Los estudiantes conviven haciendo diversas actividades en la playa. Diego reta a Javier a una carrera en moto acuática y el ganador se queda con Rob.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel encuentra a Mía platicando con Lucca en la alberca. Giovanni consigue botellas de licor para la fiesta en la playa. Mía habla con Celina y Vico y vuelven a ser mejores amigas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Antes de regresar, los alumnos hacen una última actividad en el mar. Miguel manda a Santos a investigar a Mia, pero ella se da cuenta e inventa que se acostó con Luca. Martín le confiesa sus intenciones amorosas a Carla.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le exige una explicación a Mia sobre Luca. Roberta le advierte a Diego que si Mia y Miguel siguen peleando, se terminará RBD. Javier le inventa a Roberta que Diego anda diciendo que la puede tener cuando quiera.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Diana le llama a la policía para informarle dónde está escondida Fiorella. Pedro encuentra la evidencia para demostrar que Fiorella es inocente. Unos hombres tratan de abusar de Gianna y Gael logra rescatarla.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Pedro consigue un video que demuestra que Fiorella es inocente. Por su parte, Vittorio le dice a Fiorella que no quiere que siga trabajando con Eloísa y que la llevará a vivir con él.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Roxana le dice a su familia que Gael está enamorado de Gianna, y Eloísa le pide que se enamore de una mujer que no sea una sirvienta. Pedro le pide a Fiorella que luchen juntos por su amor.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Pedro le promete a Gael que lo ayudará a superar su adicción. Increíblemente, Julieta recupera la vista y, después de alegrarse mucho, trata muy mal a Fiorella. Por otro lado, el médico le confirma a Sonia que está embarazada.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fiorella le dice a Pedro que no merece su amor por haberse metido con la esposa de su primo. Por su parte, Pedro le pide a Fiorella que no cometa el error de casarse con alguien que no ama.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Matías y Roberta le recriminan a Renata y Benjamín por el engaño. Roberta promete vengarse. Honorio y Constanza van a cenar a casa de Agatha por invitación de Adri. Agatha se nota incómoda.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Gonzalo regresa y le dice a Renata que lo ha decepcionado, Fina la echa de la casa. Fina le propone a Roberta hacerle creer a Matías que el bebé es de él. Renata le presenta su renuncia a Gonzalo.

programme.title: Gregorio y Su Ángel
programme.desc: En México, un anciano (Broderick Crawford) alcohólico hace amistad con una niña pequeña que es como un ángel.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: El Chanfle II
programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.title: Chiquidrácula
programme.desc: Un abuelo alcohólico enferma gravemente. Su médico dice que sólo un gran susto puede curarlo y su nieto decide dárselo.

programme.title: Las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado, después de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: ¡Pura vida!
programme.desc: Un hombre con mala suerte va a la capital con sus parientes, y se involucra en enredos con los patrones ricos de éstos.

programme.title: Calabacitas tiernas
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Tin Tan se relaciona con un pícaro empresario arruinado que lo hace pasar por sí mismo para evitar dar la cara ante sus acreedores. En su nueva personalidad, Tin Tan monta un espectáculo musical con hermosas chicas.

programme.title: Dos Fantasmas y Una Muchacha
programme.desc: En un viejo teatro viven dos fantasmas que se odian, pues se mataron uno al otro por el amor de una muchacha.

programme.title: El rey de México
programme.desc: Un estibador del mercado de la Ciudad de México recibe una oferta inusual. Un periodista le propone ser el 'Rey de México' por unos días. ¿Qué hay detrás de esta propuesta?

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pedir perdón que pedir permiso
programme.desc: Desde niño, Pepe ha pensado que su mamá había muerto. Conoce a una mujer mayor, de la cual piensa que se ha enamorado, sin saber que el destino le tiene preparado una fuerte noticia que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Doncellez y preñez no pueden ser a la vez
programme.desc: Galia es una chica cuyo máximo sueño es bailar. Junto con sus amigas Cintia y Julls asisten a una especie de clínica de baile con uno de los mejores profesores de danza. No se imaginan la mala experiencia que tendrán que vivir.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: En casa del pobre, el que no trabaja no come
programme.desc: Una joven descubre lo mucho que su mamá sufre y hace para mantener un hogar cuando sufre un infarto y ella debe encargarse de los quehaceres de la casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer se encuentra en condiciones de extrema pobreza y decide abandonar a su hija en casa de su madre. Debido a su enfermedad, la abuela recurre a la tía de la niña para que la ayude a cuidarla, pero las cosas no salen como ellas esperan.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pájaro en mano que cien volando
programme.desc: En su afán por progresar rápido, Gaby estará muy cerca de caer en las malvadas garras de un estafador.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que se casa, para su casa
programme.desc: La madre de Mariana se niega a perderla e inventa una mentira para que ella y su esposo se queden a vivir con ella.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La vida es dura pero madura
programme.desc: Felipe es utilizado y explotado por su madre y Azul, una bailarina que conoce en un club de strippers, con quien se obsesiona.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: En la guerra y en el amor todo se vale

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia arranca y los seis talentosos escuadrones comienzan la lucha por alcanzar sus sueños. Los capitales se enfrentan en una divertida prueba de imitación.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Varios talentos de las temporadas anteriores de Pequeños Gigantes regresan para unirse a los participantes y ayudarlos en su prueba de canto.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desesperados por encontrar una cura para la terrible enfermedad de su hija, una pareja aceptó ser parte de un experimento y arriesgarse a las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Entre lágrimas, un niño le confiesa a su madre adoptiva que quiere volver con su familia biológica. Estrellas latinas del Cirque du Soleil hablan sobre el cambio drástico en sus vidas tras la pandemia, pues se vieron obligadas a dejar los shows.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Tras múltiples denuncias, una red de oscuros secretos y abusos a menores es descubierta. Los líderes de una iglesia se ven envueltos en terribles crímenes que tendrán que pagar en prisión.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Dos hermanas convirtieron una deliciosa receta de su madre en un gran negocio. Un hombre pasó de ser astronautra a cultivar las mejores uvas para hacer vino.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La muerte de un gurú ha generado misterio y dudas entre sus seguidores. Solo cuatro personas sobrevivieron a la tragedia del vuelo 965 y aún lidian con el dolor y el trauma.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Monseñor Oscar Romero es mostrado como el hombre de la iglesia de los pobres, se le dio el calificativo de Romero Mártir por lo que se puede ser beatificado sin la necesidad de haber hecho un milagro.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Dig into a so-called total kitchen reno that turns out to be only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Nancie and Woody moved into a 25-year-old townhouse that required some updating- particularly the floors and the "tiny" kitchen space. As renovations got underway, Woody was unexpectedly hospitalized. The contractors were left virtually unsupervised while Nancie tried to manage her job, visit Woody and take care of their daughter. All of the contractors were very sympathetic to her stating, "don't worry about the renovations- you are in good hands." What they left behind was simply one big mistake- one that Mike and the team will correct, with the help of a Country singing guest star.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane, a single mom, lives in a typical new home development with her two kids. Since the day they moved into the brand new home, they have been plagued with repeated plumbing and heating issues. During a recent winter cold spell, the porch ceiling caved in, exposin g questionable minimum building code practices and building materials- luckily, Mike and his team have the right answers.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: First, Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck. Next, Matt, Froy, and Lou bring the debtors to the ground when they head out to repo a back hoe tractor. And finally, Froy, Lou, and Lyndah bully their way through a bunch of ignorant punk kids to grab some four wheelers.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?
programme.desc: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity. Next, Matt and Froy stand in the way of a drugged debtor keeping his car. And finally, it's time for some ice cream for Lou, Froy, and Sonia when they head out to repo an ice cream truck.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments. Then, Matt and Froy deal with an unhelpful citizen when they have to repossess from a cop. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt deal with another repossessor when trying to repo a repo truck, until Lou can get on scene and offer the debtor a deal.

programme.title: Hairy Situations
programme.desc: First, things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop. Next, everybody's crying when Lou and Froy's repossession from a young couple ends with a pepper spray to everyone's face. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou repo the targeted car while Matt stands his ground with a family of thugs.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: First, Matt, Froy, and Lou do a legal repossession of an attorney's car. Next, Froy, Lyndah, and Sonia are speechless when they interrupt two girls in the back of a car. And finally, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a bunch of confused ATV owners blindsided by Lou's quick acquisition of their quads.

programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees. Next, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah deal with a debtor with issues when they take possession of a taco truck. And Finally, Matt, Lou, and Sonia take on a big repo at a dealership and come out with six cars.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard. Next, Matt and Froy go on another repo to repossess from a preacher that believes it would be blasphemy to repo his car. And finally, cops arrive in the middle of what may be Matt and Froy's last repo. Lou has to swoop in and smooth out the situation.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.title: Ready, Set, Pet
programme.desc: After moving to New York and leaving her first dog with her parents in Florida, Mariana is finally ready to bring a new dog into her home. With the help of her roommate, Mariana meets three very different dogs.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Pet
programme.desc: Two New Jersey families are looking to adopt the perfect canine companion, but they need to spruce up their backyards first.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Glens and her husband of 52 years are at war. Over a dog. Glens has macular degeneration, and is steadily going blind. It is her goal to find a clever companion dog, a well-mannered and lovely tempered dog that will suffer the grandchildren and with great hope, be her guide. Jay struggles with anxiety, but when she met Tank, she knew that owning a dog would demand presence, and ultimately decided that a dog would be a far better match than the human kind.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Lucy is a specialist service medic-alert dog trainer. She is on the hunt to adopt a dog that needs to meet her specific criteria for training, and the dog will live with her and her family until it is trained for a person in need. Kat is an introvert and hates shopping for anything so she does it all online, including finding her fur baby. She is a writer looking for a dog that will fit in with her lifestyle she loves her sleep and is reluctant to have anyone or anything disturb it.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: David and Beryl are childhood sweethearts. In their late 60's now, they've been married for many enviably happy years. David has Multiple Sclerosis and they both felt it was time to bring a dog in the mix to be of assistance. Sue is a Cape Town local, with an illustrious record of international commercials behind her. She raises awareness that animals are sentient beings, deserving of as much love as much as every human and finds herself adopting a dog, even though it wasn't part of the plan.

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend
programme.sub-title: Dill (French Bulldog) and Pickles (Pig) / Mercury (Mini Horse) and Sirius (Maremma Sheepdog)
programme.desc: In Northern California, Dill the French Bulldog and Pickles the Pig love spending time together, especially taking agility class, baths and long walks on the beach. In Florida, a young mini therapy horse named Mercury forms an unlikely bond and shares an uncanny resemblance to his friend Sirius, a Maremma Sheepdog.

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: At a Florida rescue, Rose, a fox and Bindi, a raccoon, love to play together and stirring up loads of mischief! A Doberman puppy and a rescued Coatimundi play together like besties and even get time outs when it gets a bit too rough!

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend
programme.sub-title: Rose (chicken) Biscuit (chihuahua) / June Racoon) and Waffles (Viszla)
programme.desc: Rose, the rescued chicken, outweighs her BFF Biscuit, a rescued Chihuahua – 2 to 1! But that hasn't stopped these unlikely mates from forming a close bond that has helped them both thrive at a micro sanctuary in Brooklyn. programme.title: Lynx
programme.desc: May I introduce myself: my name is Lynx. I have a short tail and characteristic tufts of black hair on the tips of my ears. Usually I'm very shy but still quite curious of the world around me. This is why I discovered the 15 cameras that have been set up in the Bohemian forest to catch all my activities with their sensors. With the help of local rangers they know where to find me and my friends when we go out for a hunt at night, or even in the intimate hours during our mating season. The cameras also pick up my impressive athletic abilities I am capable of, such as my long leaps and my talent to remain unseen to my predators. Skills like these make me a great hunter, come see how I use them!

Today, these untamed horses are fighting for their freedom and even their very survival in the wide open spaces of the American West. But who is aware that these present-day Mustangs are first and foremost the guardians of an unheralded heritage? That of the horses of the New World. This is an epic story, nearly 500 years old, and we have chosen to tell it through an exceptional journey, akin to that taken by the horses themselves.
